meta.title: Perplexity AI Pages - Say Goodbye to Writing Content
meta.description:
Perplexity Pages - AI content writing has just become 10x better
Get a 10$ discount on Perplexity AI  https://bit.ly/3VL1ujN


Perplexity AI has released a new update, you can now create pages with AI. Just type in your topics and perplexity will create a complete page with text and images.
